docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MORALES, DIEGO AS TO DEFENDANT LUXOR CAB COMPANY LAZAR, PAM LAZAR, BILL GATES, PAUL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-17-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORALES, DIEGO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUXOR CAB COMPANY LAZAR, PAM LAZAR, BILL GATES, PAUL $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,020.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
